name: @grihasetu/notes
description: Grihasetu docs/notes platform — a static MDX docs engine (Astro + MDX) split into a shared core, a feature demo and real note apps.

scripts.build: bun run build:demo && bun run build:app
scripts.build:demo: bun astro build --root packages/demo && bun pagefind --site packages/demo/dist
scripts.build:app: bun astro build --root packages/app && bun pagefind --site packages/app/dist
scripts.check: bun astro check --root packages/demo && bun astro check --root packages/app
